grace.name: Star of the Beginning
descs: One Free Normal Refresh for Shops
One Free Normal Refresh for Shops
Two Free Normal Refresh for Shops

grace.name: Cumulating Starcloud
descs: When moving to the next Floor, increase current Cost balance by 10% (max 100)
Increase E.G.O Gift sale price by 50% (once per Shop)
When moving to the next Floor, increase current Cost balance by 20% (max 125)
Increase E.G.O Gift sale price by 75% (once per Shop)
When moving to the next Floor, increase current Cost balance by 30% (max 150)
Increase E.G.O Gift sale price by 100% (once per Shop)

grace.name: Interstellar Travel
descs: When choosing a new Theme Pack for the first time, all Identities gain +3 Level(s) (max 9)
When choosing a new Theme Pack for the first time, all Identities gain +3 Level(s) (max 9)
If 45+ Theme Packs are unlocked in the Theme Pack Compendium, gain 1 Clash Power
When choosing a new Theme Pack for the first time, all Identities gain +3 Level(s) (max 9)
If 45+ Theme Packs are unlocked in the Theme Pack Compendium, gain 2 Clash Power

grace.name: Star-shower
descs: When Choosing Starlight from Encounter Reward Cards, Cost +75
When Choosing Starlight from Encounter Reward Cards, Cost +150

grace.name: Binary Star-shop
descs: Greater chance for high Tier E.G.O Gifts to appear in Shops
Greater chance for high Tier E.G.O Gifts to appear in Shops
Upon entering a Shop, add up all the Tier numbers of currently owned E.G.O Gifts and gain it as Cost (max 75)
Greater chance for high Tier E.G.O Gifts to appear in Shops
Upon entering a Shop, add up all the Tier numbers of currently owned E.G.O Gifts and gain it as Cost (max 150)

grace.name: Moon Star-shop
descs: One Free Keyword Refresh for Shops
Upon entering Floor 1, gain 1 random Tier 1 E.G.O Gift(s)
One Free Keyword Refresh for Shops
Upon entering Floor 1, gain 2 random Tier 1 E.G.O Gift(s)
+10% chance for super Shop to appear
Two Free Keyword Refresh for Shops
Upon entering Floor 1, gain 3 random Tier 1 E.G.O Gift(s)
+25% chance for super Shop to appear

grace.name: Favor of the Nebulae
descs: Upon entry, all Identities gain 3 Level(s)
Upon Floor clear, all Identities gain 1 Level(s) (max 5)
Upon entry, all Identities gain 3 Level(s)
Upon Floor clear, all Identities gain 1 Level(s) (max 9)
Upon entry, all Identities gain 3 Level(s)
Upon entering Floor 6, all Identities gain 3 Level(s)
Upon Floor clear, all Identities gain 1 Level(s) (max 9)

grace.name: Chance Comet
descs: Upon entering a Shop, gain 1 random Tier 3 or less For Fuse or Sale only E.G.O Gift(s)
Upon entering Floor 3, gain 1 random Tier 3 E.G.O Gift(s)
When fusing, gain a random additional E.G.O Gift 2 Tiers below the Fusion result(must be Tier 3 or higher) (once per Shop)
Upon entering a Shop, gain 1 'For Fuse or Sale only E.G.O Gift'
Upon entering Floor 3/Floor 5, gain 1 Tier 3 E.G.O Gift from the selected Keyword category
When fusing, gain a random additional E.G.O Gift 2 Tiers below the Fusion result(must be Tier 3 or higher) (once per Shop)
Upon entering a Shop, gain 1 'For Fuse or Sale only E.G.O Gift'
Upon entering Floor 3/Floor 5/Floor 7, gain 1 random Tier 4 E.G.O Gift from the selected Keyword category
When fusing, gain a random additional E.G.O Gift 1 Tier below the Fusion result(must be Tier 3 or higher) (once per Shop)

grace.name: Perfected Possibility
descs: Upon entry, gain 1 Tier 3 E.G.O Gift(s) of your choice for the selected Keyword (if no remaining Gifts meet the conditions, a lower Tier one will appear instead)
Upon entry, gain 2 Tier 3 E.G.O Gift(s) of your choice for the selected Keyword (if no remaining Gifts meet the conditions, a lower Tier one will appear instead)
Upon entry, gain 3 Tier 3 E.G.O Gift(s) of your choice for the selected Keyword (if no remaining Gifts meet the conditions, a lower Tier one will appear instead)

11.name: Mark of Fire I
11.desc: Turn End: all allies take 5 fixed HP damage. Fixed damage increases by 3 every turn. (max 20)

11.name: Inflation I
11.desc: Doubles the cost of every Shop function, except for selling E.G.O Gifts

11.name: Ego Interference I
11.desc:
Doubles the amount of E.G.O Resources consumed when using E.G.O Skills
(This Adversity does not interact with E.G.O Gift effects)

11.name: Force Redistribution
11.desc: When an enemy is killed, it applies 3 Offense Level Up to all of its allies at the next Turn Start (3 times per turn; start of a new wave counts as Turn Start as well)

12.name: Mental Psychosis I
12.desc: Turn End: all allies lose 3 SP

12.name: Nerve Acceleration I
12.desc: Raise Min & Max Speed values by 1 for all enemies

12.name: SP Fatigue I
12.desc: In battles, allies cannot heal higher than 35 SP

12.name: Psychological Elation
12.desc: Turn Start: All enemies heal 20 SP

13.name: Tremor Barrier
13.desc: Remove the first Stagger Threshold for all enemies

13.name: Inflation II
13.desc:
Triples the cost of every Shop function, except for selling E.G.O Gifts

※ If a lower tier Adversity already exists, overwrite that effect

13.name: Ego Interference II
13.desc:
Triples the amount of E.G.O Resources consumed when using E.G.O Skills
(Does not interact with E.G.O Gift effects)
※ If a lower tier Adversity already exists, overwrite that effect

13.name: Shield Generation
13.desc:
Apply 3000 Shield on all enemies
(In Focused Encounters, applies to Core only; Shield gained by this effect does not expire at Turn End)

14.name: Vitality Boost
14.desc: +30% to max HP for all enemies

14.name: Brutality
14.desc: Plus Coin Power +2, Minus Coin Power -2 for all enemies

14.name: Mark of Fire II
14.desc:
Turn End: all allies take 10 fixed HP damage. Fixed damage increases by 5 every turn. (max 30)
※ If a lower tier Adversity already exists, overwrite that effect

14.name: Fracture Proliferation
14.desc: Enemy Skills inflict x2 Burn, Bleed, Tremor, Rupture, and Sinking

15.name: Mental Psychosis II
15.desc:
Turn End: all allies lose 5 SP
※ If a lower tier Adversity already exists, overwrite that effect

15.name: Nerve Acceleration II
15.desc: Raise Min & Max Speed values by 2 for all enemies

15.name: SP Fatigue II
15.desc:
In battles, allies cannot heal higher than 30 SP
※ If a lower tier Adversity already exists, overwrite that effect

15.name: Status Infliction
15.desc: Turn Start: Inflict 5 Potency of a random status, chosen from Burn, Bleed, Tremor, Rupture, and Sinking, on all allies(Identities)
